---
title: "01_introduction_to_git"
subtitle: "Introduction"
author: "Lennart Wittkuhn, Christoph Koch, Ondrej Zika"
institute: "Max Planck Research Group NeuroCode"
date: "2016/12/12 (updated: `r Sys.Date()`)"
output:
  xaringan::moon_reader:
    self_contained: true
    yolo: false
    lib_dir: libs
    nature:
      highlightStyle: github
      highlightLines: true
      countIncrementalSlides: false
---
class: center, middle

# Introduction to ```git```
- A bullet point

---

## This is classic Linus Torvalds
<img src="img/01_introduction_to_git_01.jpeg" alt="Linus Torvalds">

---

## This is recent Linus Torvalds
<img src="img/01_introduction_to_git_02.jpeg" alt="Linus Torvalds">

---

## This is artwork of Linus Torvalds
<img src="img/01_introduction_to_git_04.jpeg" alt="Linus Torvalds" style="width:200px">
<img src="img/01_introduction_to_git_05.jpeg" alt="Linus Torvalds" style="width:200px">
<img src="img/01_introduction_to_git_06.jpeg" alt="Linus Torvalds" style="width:200px">
<img src="img/01_introduction_to_git_07.jpeg" alt="Linus Torvalds" style="width:200px">

---

## This is also Linus Torvalds (but let's not talk about it)
<img src="img/01_introduction_to_git_03.jpeg" alt="Linus Torvalds" style="width:200px">

---

## The Story of ```git```
**"I'm an egoistical bastard, and I name all my projects after myself. First 'Linux', now 'Git'"**
- Developed after licensing blocked free usage of BitKeeper since company broke down (2005)
- First version after a couple of days
"git can mean anything, depending on your mood"

---

## ```git``` is a DVCS
- "Distributed Version Control System"

---

### subsection
#### slide title
